description: ORN 31 subgrade strength classes. CRITICAL: These are DIFFERENT from MoWT S1-S6 classes (Table 3.1). Do not cross-reference between the two systems.

comparison_with_mowt.warning: ORN 31 5th Edition Table 3-9 subgrade classes have SIMILAR but NOT IDENTICAL boundaries to MoWT Table 3.1. The S1 class in ORN 31 covers CBR <3% while MoWT S1 covers CBR <=2%. Always use the classification from the method being applied.

notes: ORN 31 5th Edition uses 6 subgrade classes defined by CBR
Assessment should use 10th percentile CBR from at least 10 readings per uniform section
DCP-CBR correlation can be used but with apparatus-specific caveat
For design, the CBR at the most critical moisture condition should be used
